headline: Palantir Stock on Pace for Worst Month in 5 Years
summary: A bad year for  Palantir Technologies  stock keeps getting worse, with shares set to log their worst monthly decline in five years after breaking below a key level of support on Monday.  Palantir  stock fell 3.1% to $113.07 on Wednesday, set to close at its lowest price in more than a year.  It’s been a rough stretch for the stock, which has fallen nearly 16% during its current six-day losing streak.

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Zeta Global Holdings (ZETA) Palantir-Powered Rebuild Of Its Data Cloud
summary: Zeta Global recently announced a partnership with Palantir Technologies to rebuild its Data Cloud on Palantir’s Foundry platform, using Athena by Zeta as the AI layer to connect operational data, customer insights, and marketing execution for large enterprises. This agreement positions Athena as an “operating system” for agentic marketing, potentially making Zeta’s platform more embedded in enterprise workflows where data security and governance are critical.
